actions.code: (() => { try { const t = (document.body && document.body.innerText ? document.body.innerText : '').toLowerCase(); const hasVerify = t.includes('security verification') || t.includes('verify you are human') || t.includes('checking your browser') || t.includes('cloudflare'); if (hasVerify) return 'VERIFY'; const hasInput = !!document.querySelector('textarea, [contenteditable="true"], input[placeholder*="ask" i]'); const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a')).slice(0, 12); let blueLinks = 0; for (const a of links) { try { if (getComputedStyle(a).color === 'rgb(0, 0, 238)') blueLinks++; } catch (e) {} } const hasArenaHints = t.includes('new chat') || t.includes('leaderboard') || t.includes('battle mode'); if (blueLinks >= 3 && hasArenaHints) return 'BLACK'; if (hasInput) return 'READY'; return 'UNKNOWN'; } catch (e) { return 'UNKNOWN'; } })()
